revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
<!--Info passed is used in the following order:
{{hatnote|In this <article>, the <mod1><family_name> is '' <1>''<mod2>. <postscript>}}
-->{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=Family name explanation|_include-positional=yes|type=hatnote}}<noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: <!--Info passed is used in the following order: {{hatnote|In this <article>, the <mod1><family_name> is '' <1>''<mod2>. <postscript>}} -->{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=Family name explanation|_include-positional=yes|type=hatnote}}<noinclude> {{documentation}} </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

<!--Info passed is used in the following order: {{hatnote|In this <article>, the <mod1><family_name> is '' <1>''<mod2>. <postscript>}} -->{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=Family name explanation|_include-positional=yes|type=hatnote}}<noinclude> {{documentation}}

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Family_name_hatnote here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Family_name_hatnote for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <!--Info passed is used in the following order: {{hatnote|In this <article>, the <mod1><family_name> is '' <1>''<mod2>. <postscript>}} -->{{#invoke:Template wrapper|wrap|_template=Family name explanation|_include-positional=yes|type=hatnote}}<noinclude> {{documentation}}
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
